reason: JSON Schema 2020-12 closed structural contracts, exact compound action requirements, per-tool titles, and conservative MCP annotations make the original compact budget infeasible without omitting required validation fields. The compact projection omits examples, negative-example extensions, and deep descriptive guidance while retaining the exact validation structure and a concise closed common output envelope; full/catalog/runtime retain committed examples and the detailed documented output contract.

measurement.estimatedTokens: ceil(bytes / 4); deterministic planning estimate, not a model tokenizer

previous.status: historical target rejected because it cannot contain the exact conditional validation schemas required by the reviewed contract

omittedFromCompactOnly: descriptions below the first schema level

largestTools.name: editor_transaction
largestTools.reason: ten exact operation discriminators with required and forbidden fields

largestTools.name: game_scenario
largestTools.reason: safe input/observe step allowlists and nested wait-condition discriminators

membershipRevision.compatibility: godot_tools remains full-catalog callable but is no longer advertised on the default core surface

discoveryEvidence.historicalAlgorithm: all-term substring filtering in definition order
discoveryEvidence.gain: The reviewed core adds direct hold input plus separate read-only discovery and hidden execution identities; the deterministic ranked corpus passes all required intent variants.

revisionPolicy: Any change to measured size, core membership, or reviewed maxima must update this evidence file and its contract test in the same change.
